title: Alphabet, SpaceX Spur Record U.S. Equity Sales
summary: U.S. stock sales are on track for a record this year, as massive offerings from SpaceX, Alphabet and others push totals past a 2021 high. And bankers are pitching other public tech companies on issuing more stock.
caption: output/2026-07-19/alphabet-spacex-spur-record-u-s-equity-sales.txt
